rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE MARTYNENKO FAMILY 1991 TRUST TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion By Respondent Zoya Soane For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Motion for Summary Judgment. Tentative ruling: Motion for Summary Judgment is granted. There is no triable issue of material fact based on the following reasons: 1. Trust issues. Specifically, revocability of trust/whether trust was revoked/election to dispose of property outside trust. See evidence cited in Respondent's statement of undisputed facts with reference to supporting evidence at fact nos. 1-11,22,24-27,29,31,34,42-43 and 45-48. Also, Petitioner lacks standing. 2. Breac of fiduciary duty. Petitioner lacks standing and statute of limitations. See evidence cited in Respondent's statement of undisputed facts with reference to supporting evidence at fact nos. 9-27,32-33, and 42. 3. Elder abuse. Statute of limitations. See evidence cited in Respondent's statement of undisputed facts with reference to supporting evidence at fact nos. 5,12-24,32-33 and 42. Motion for Summary Adjudication. Tenative ruling: Off-calendar.

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp 128.7; Memorandum In Support;And Declaration Of E.A. Koplowitz.
rulings.Rulings: Tentative ruling: Continued to October 29, 2009, for status of appeal filed by Patricia Hewlett.
